'''''Warspite''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
It was part of the [[Task force/Legends|task force]], led by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], during [[Operation Strike Fear]]. While mustering in the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]] it was identified by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] reconnaissance mission flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a lone [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]]. It was supported by a group of three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] designated [[427]].

The ''Warspite'' also used a devastating jump-and-drop [[Skirmish near Brigia|attack]] on medical ships rendezvousing after the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brigia]]. Several [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]], along with the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Korolev]]'', were transferring wounded personnel to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']]. The ''Warspite'' dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and launched [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] fighters. It then jumped to hyperspace again, emerging on the other side of the transfer and launching more fighters. The defending Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] had moved to intercept the first wave and were out of position for the second wave. However, the pilots of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], particularly [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], evaded the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] long enough to destroy both waves of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], and all Rebel ships escaped. Even so, the tactic earned the ''Warspite'' a notoriety among future Alliance pilots, who would all have to face a [[Redemption scenario|training scenario]] based on the mission, which was considered nearly impossible to beat.

Later, some captured [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] technical staff were being transferred to the ''Warspite'' and the Nebulon-B frigate ''[[Negra Star]]'' for transportation to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The Alliance mounted a rescue operation and sent a lone [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]], flown by Keyan Farlander, to identify which [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] were carrying the Sullustans and to disable them. Farlander then fought TIEs launched from the nearby frigates while Rebel transports rescued the prisoners.

==Description==
The ''Warspite'' was painted dark [[Color/Legends|gray]] and marked with a large black Imperial emblem on each side of the bow of each ship. Although equipped with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries, its target accuracy was extremely poor.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:HMS Warspite|HMS ''Warspite'']] was the name of nine ships of the British Royal Navy, including one of the most famous British battleships.

The ''Warspite'' Nebulon-B escort frigate was represented in the [[2007]] initial release of the ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG]]'' as a miniature.<ref name="Mini" />
